text: I feel an intriguing mix of anticipation and contemplation. The first image reveals a threshold, a boundary between ordinary space and the glow of a creative hub. Stepping through the glass, the world tilts, inviting me to abandon certainty. Inside, amid symbols of research and development, I am confronted with questions—about innovation, existence, and the act of observing itself. I am both participant and witness, immersed in the blur of curiosity and meaning-making.
